metadata.name: Add Points Manually to Loyalty Account

description: A customer forgot to use their loyalty card during a previous purchase. A customer service agent needs to add the points manually.

nodes.task_description: Look up the customer's loyalty account.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent finds the correct account.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's previous purchase using their receipt.

expected_outcome.expected: The agent confirms the sale and calculates the points that should have been earned.

nodes.task_description: Manually add the calculated points to the customer's account with a note explaining the reason.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer's point balance is corrected.
